# Agent instructions for this branch

This branch publishes a static index of Pi session exports.

## Branch purpose

- Branch: `gh-pages`
- App entrypoint: `index.html`
- Session exports live under: `sessions/`
- Session index file: `sessions.jsonl`

## Required commit behavior

Agents MUST keep commits small and direct.

When adding a new session export, agents MUST:

1. Add the exported HTML file under `sessions/`.
2. Name the file `<isodate>-<snake-case-description>.html`.
3. Add one JSONL record to `sessions.jsonl` with `date`, `path`, and `title` fields.
4. Keep each `sessions.jsonl` line valid JSON.
5. Use relative paths from repository root.
6. Verify `index.html` can read the new entry.

Filename requirements:

- `<isodate>` SHOULD be `YYYY-MM-DD` unless multiple exports from the same day need ordering.
- If ordering is needed, use full ISO timestamp without characters unsafe for filenames, e.g. `2026-06-23T14-30-00Z`.
- `<snake-case-description>` MUST use lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores.
- Example: `sessions/2026-06-23-build_session_index.html`

Required JSONL format:

```jsonl
{"date":"2026-06-23","path":"sessions/2026-06-23-build_session_index.html","title":"Build session index"}
```

Rules:

- `date` MUST match the filename date prefix.
- `path` MUST point at the exported HTML file.
- `title` MUST be human-readable.

## Commit message format

Use terse commit messages:

- `add session export: <short-name>`
- `update session index`
- `fix session index app`

## Do not

Agents MUST NOT use the GitHub API to discover session files at runtime.
Agents MUST NOT rewrite existing session export files unless fixing a known broken export.
Agents MUST NOT remove entries from `sessions.jsonl` unless deleting or renaming the matching file.
Agents MUST NOT commit unrelated project files to this branch.

## Validation

Before committing, agents SHOULD check:

- `sessions.jsonl` exists
- Every non-empty, non-comment line in `sessions.jsonl` parses as JSON object with `date`, `path`, and `title`
- Every listed `.html` path exists
- Every listed session filename matches `<isodate>-<snake-case-description>.html` and starts with the `date` field

If validation cannot be completed, agents MUST say what was not verified in commit notes or handoff.
